overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas showing the character CJ running along a waterfront boardwalk during sunset. The character moves from a stone-paved promenade near a commercial building onto a wooden boardwalk, passing palm trees, street lamps, benches, and other pedestrians with the ocean visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade adjacent to commercial building

events.description: ground surface transitions from hexagonal stone tiles to wooden boardwalk planks

agents.ego_description: running from the stone paved area toward the waterfront boardwalk, passing under colorful pennant banners

entered.detail: multi-story building facade with colorful triangular pennant banners strung overhead
hexagonal stone tile pathway in earth tones
tall palm trees lining the path to the waterfront
long wooden dock structure extending over the calm water
calm sea reflecting the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a commercial building decorated with colorful pennant banners, running along a stone paved path toward the waterfront. The character moves from the built environment toward an open wooden pier structure visible in the distance, with palm trees lining the right side and the ocean coming into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boardwalk with seating and lighting

events.description: passing red and white patio umbrellas over outdoor seating areas on the right

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wide wooden boardwalk toward the setting sun, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking along the boardwalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: wide wooden plank walkway with visible grain and gaps between boards
tall black posts with multiple spherical white light globes
wooden slatted benches facing the ocean for viewers to sit
large alternating red and white patio umbrellas over outdoor tables

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the open wooden boardwalk with unobstructed views of the ocean to the right and the sunset sky ahead. Street lamps and benches line the path, with red and white umbrellas marking seating areas. The scene is sparsely populated with only a few distant pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: populated boardwalk section with pedestrian traffic

events.description: slight lateral movement to navigate around oncoming pedestrians on the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: running through a moderately crowded section of the boardwalk, weaving between pedestrians walking in opposing directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the left side
shirtless pedestrian in shorts walking toward the camera on the right side

entered.detail: group of people walking along the boardwalk in the distance
green forested hills visible across the water on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk becomes more populated as the character continues running, encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The character navigates through the moderate crowd while the wooden planks continue along the waterfront, with benches and umbrellas now closer on the right and forested hills visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a built commercial area toward an increasingly populated waterfront boardwalk under a sunset sky. It begins near a building decorated with colorful pennant banners, moving along a stone paved path as palm trees and the ocean first emerge on the right. As the character transitions from the stone promenade onto an open wooden pier, the environment expands to reveal a wide vista of the sea lined with street lamps, benches, and red and white umbrellas. The scene then shifts from a sparsely populated stretch to a more crowded boardwalk, where the camera navigates through pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the path continues along the water's edge, passing closer seating areas while forested hills become visible across the distant horizon.
